name: IntroVideoMinFit
notes: Guarantees the opening video remains visible for at least 3 seconds and longer if assets still load; removes startup loading bars/copy; tightens lobby/settings/popup text fit and keeps exit UX guarded.
label: Minimum intro video, wordless loading, copy fit, and exit guard
description: Game start uses only the intro video as the loading surface. The video is shown for at least 3 seconds and loops until all required assets are ready.
